puzzleDescription: Learn how to collect two different integer inputs from a user and calculate their sum.
objective: Input two numbers 10 and 20 then print the sum.
hints: Use 'sc.nextInt()' twice to get two different numbers.
Store them in variables (e.g., int x = sc.nextInt(); int y = sc.nextInt();).
Print the sum using System.out.println(x + y);
